description: A control room operator for a processing plant adjusts the operation of a SAG mill to maximize throughput while avoiding overload.

nodes.task_description: Review the real-time operating parameters of the SAG mill, including power draw, bearing pressure, and feed rate.

expected_outcome.value: The operator has a clear view of the mill's current performance.

nodes.task_description: Notice that the power draw is below the optimal target, indicating the mill can take more feed.

expected_outcome.value: The operator correctly identifies an opportunity to increase throughput.

nodes.task_description: Slightly increase the speed of the conveyor belt feeding ore into the mill to increase the feed rate.

expected_outcome.value: The feed rate is increased, and the mill's power draw moves closer to the optimal target, increasing throughput.
